message:
fix(node): NaN/Inf propagation guards and TOCTOU socket cleanup

- reputation_graph_apis: filter non-finite edge weights, clamp NaN composite to base_score
- bpet/economic_integration: validate cost/risk_reduction/expected_loss for is_finite()
- atc_participation_weighting: retain only finite weights before median sort
- telemetry_bridge: eliminate TOCTOU by removing exists() check before socket cleanup
- proof_scheduler: remove unused `queued` variable (clippy -D warnings)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
